item.name: Hellpup
item.description:
Not all children are products of their environment. This one, however, is.

Use item to acquire the hellpup minion.
item.tooltip:
Another wolf pup itchin'
to get in the ring, are ye?
   - Maelstrom Drill Sergeant
item.specialactiondescription:
Reduces minion summoning recast time by 50%.
Duration: 10s

obj.n: Mama Said Knock You Out III
